name: Record decision — status verification
pageTitle: Assess consignments - Import and export applications - GOV.UK
caption: CHED overview
heading: Import notifications
bodyCopy: Inspections in the next 24 hours, or should have been inspected recently
progressiveDisclosureNote: The initial landing page (action 161, before any Search) renders only SIX visible form controls: Select BCP (bip), Keywords or CHED number (keywords), Commodity (commodity), CHED status (certificateStatus), CHED type (certificateType), Country of origin (countryOfOrigin). The EXTENDED filter panel — Consignee, Decision, Risk outcome, Microchip number, Risk category, the 'Filter by arrival date and time' fieldset (Start/End date + Start/End time) and 'Sort by' (orderBy) — only appears on the search RESULTS page after the first Search (action 164). This progressive disclosure was re-verified by re-running the control inventory at action 161 (6 controls) vs action 164 (all controls). VERIFIED 2026-07-18.

structure.text: Filter by arrival date and time

structure.govukComponent: Date input + bespoke defra-datepicker (results page only)
Date input + bespoke defra-datepicker (results page only)

structure.text: Valid — #Status-Label on the CHED Overview page reached by opening a result

Field labels across the search + filter form (22 on the results page; only 6 on the initial landing page)

govukComponents.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 164 (Filter/Update sort belong to the results-page filter panel; Search + Apply at action 161)

nonStandardPatterns.pattern: defra-datepicker / date-picker__container / date-picker__dialog / date-picker__reveal__icon / date-picker__button__previous-month / date-picker__button__next-month / date-picker__button__close / date-picker__heading / date-picker__date-table / date-picker-day / date-input--picker
nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Bespoke JavaScript calendar/date-picker widget layered over the govuk-date-input text fields for Start date and End date, with a 'Choose date' reveal icon and a month-navigation dialog ('July 2026', Previous month / Next month / Cancel).
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Not part of the GOV.UK Design System — a custom stateful widget with its own dialog, keyboard/focus handling and month grid. Significant a11y surface to re-implement and maintain.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: GOV.UK Date input component (govuk-date-input) alone — the Design System deliberately uses three plain text fields with no calendar overlay. The new app should drop the calendar picker and keep the day/month/year inputs.
nonStandardPatterns.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 164 (results-page filter panel; non-govuk class inventory)

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Buttons styled to look like links — used for the date shortcuts 'Today', 'Tomorrow', 'Next seven days' and for 'Clear filter'.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Bespoke class; buttons rendered as links blur the button/link semantic distinction the Design System is careful about.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: Use real links (govuk-link) for navigation-like actions, or govuk-button--secondary for form actions; the Design System has no 'link button' pattern.

nonStandardPatterns.pattern: notification-list__row / notification-list__row-container / notification-list__heading / notification-list__value / notification-list__links / notification-list__grid-column-20 / notification-list__grid-column-25 / notification-list__grid-column-30
nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Bespoke results listing that renders each matching CHED as a multi-column row (reference, type, status tag, dates, actions).
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Custom grid/table markup with hardcoded column-width classes rather than a Design System component.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: GOV.UK Table for a tabular result set, or a card/summary pattern; but the rich per-row actions may justify a bespoke list. Worth a design decision in the rebuild.

nonStandardPatterns.pattern: pagination / pagination-item / pagination-item-next / pagination-link / pagination-link-icon / pagination-link-label / pagination-link-title / pagination-list
nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Bespoke pagination control for the search results.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Custom pagination predating the Design System component.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: GOV.UK Pagination component (govuk-pagination, available since govuk-frontend v4) — a drop-in replacement in the new app.

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Bespoke 'My alerts' and 'High priority tasks' dashboard panels listing counts of notifications needing attention.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Custom operational-dashboard widgets; out of scope for the CHED-D pre-notification rebuild but present on the shared Record decision landing page.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: No direct equivalent; could be composed from govuk-summary-list / links. Likely out of scope for the new CHED-D app.

nonStandardPatterns.pattern: search-and-filter-form / search-panel / form-group / form-label-bold / display-inline-block / clear-link / break-word / aria-live-message / sr-only
nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Custom layout wrappers and legacy form classes (form-group, form-label-bold are pre-Design-System form styling) plus utility classes.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: form-group / form-label-bold are legacy remnants that duplicate govuk-form-group / govuk-label--s; mixing them signals an incomplete Design System migration.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: govuk-form-group, govuk-label--s and govuk-!-* spacing utilities cover all of these.

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: The CHED status tag whose text ('Valid') and colour (green) the inspector re-searches to verify. Uses the standard govuk-tag + govuk-tag--green plus bespoke 'tag' and 'status-label' classes and a fixed id.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Largely standard (govuk-tag--green is a real modifier). The extra 'tag'/'status-label' classes and the fixed #Status-Label id are IPAFFS-specific hooks (used as the test assertion target).
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: GOV.UK Tag with the appropriate colour modifier per status — no custom classes needed in the new app.
nonStandardPatterns.evidence: trace b3742f19b6eea5d9285f5c8739571523a0a13ec1 action 171 (verified: class="govuk-tag tag govuk-tag--green status-label")

fields.name: bip / bip-select
fields.label: Select BCP:
fields.conditionalOn: Landing-page BCP filter with its own 'Apply' button; separate from the 'Search CHEDs by' form
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 161 (landing page; reference data — BCP list, new app should source from reference-data service). NOTE: the options array is a non-contiguous sample of the ~200-entry list (many 'ABC Legal - …' entries sit between UKVTZOI8 and APHA in the real DOM); optionsTruncated flags this.

fields.name: keywords / keywords
fields.label: Keywords or CHED number
fields.hint: For example: reference, destination, consignor, transporter, documents
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 161 (landing page; input id=keywords, aria-describedby=keywords-hint, verified); trace b3742f19b6eea5d9285f5c8739571523a0a13ec1 action 166 (fill 'CHEDD.GB.2026.1525931' to re-open + verify status). Corroborated: page-objects/decision/DecisionDashboardPage.ts:18-20 inputKeywordsOrNotification = getByRole('textbox', {name: 'Keywords or CHED number'}); searchByReference() at :42-45 fills it then clicks Search — this is the load-bearing find-a-submitted-CHED-by-number control for the -1 status-verify flow.

fields.name: commodity / commodity
fields.label: Commodity
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 161 (landing page; label + 'Code or description' hint verified). Corroborated: page-objects/decision/DecisionDashboardPage.ts:176-179 showByCommodityCode() -> getByRole('textbox', {name: 'Commodity'}).fill(commodityCode) then Search — a free-text commodity code/description filter.

fields.name: certificateStatus / certificateStatus
fields.label: CHED status
observedValues: SUBMITTED (option VALUE selected by the page object to filter for new notifications; distinct from the displayed labels)
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 161 (landing page; 11 option labels verified verbatim). Page object drives this select by backend enum value: page-objects/decision/DecisionDashboardPage.ts:166-169 showNewNotifications() -> getByLabel('CHED status').selectOption('SUBMITTED'). LEGACY RESOLUTION of the value/label gap: the option VALUE is the enum key and the LABEL is its display text — ~/git/defra/ipaffs/ipaffs-frontend-decision/service/src/utils/constants.js:408-419 statusDropDownValues maps SUBMITTED->'New', so selectOption('SUBMITTED') selects the option rendered 'New'. Options built at page_managers/common/search_parameters.js:85 (value=key, text=value), prefixed by topOption 'All' (partials/dashboard/certificateStatus.html). NOTE also constants.js:61-65 getStatus(): selecting 'To process' (TO_PROCESS) expands server-side to SUBMITTED,IN_PROGRESS,MODIFY.

fields.name: certificateType / certificateType
fields.label: CHED type
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 161 (landing page; 5 options verified verbatim). LEGACY value map: ~/git/defra/ipaffs/ipaffs-frontend-decision/service/src/utils/constants.js:420-425 notificationTypes — CHED-D is enum value CED (this CHED type's legacy notification-type token); options built at page_managers/common/search_parameters.js:86, prefixed by topOption 'All'.

fields.name: countryOfOrigin / country-select
fields.label: Country of origin
fields.optionGroups: Two optgroups after the four region options: 'Country' (per-country ISO codes from countriesService.getNonUKCountries) and, when present, 'United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland' (ukRegions). Region/country lists come from the reference-data (countries) service.
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 161 (landing page; first 20 options verified against DOM order, full country list truncated — new app should source from reference-data service). Corroborated: page-objects/decision/DecisionDashboardPage.ts:171-174 showByCountryOfOrigin() -> getByLabel('Country of origin').selectOption(countryOfOrigin) then Search. LEGACY value map for the four top region options: ~/git/defra/ipaffs/ipaffs-frontend-decision/service/src/views/partials/dashboard/countryOfOrigin.html:40-68 (option values '', EEA, GB-CI, ROW hardcoded; countries + ukRegions optgroups populated from search_parameters.js:75-76 countriesService).

fields.name: consignee / consignee
fields.label: Consignee
fields.conditionalOn: Results-page filter panel only — NOT present on the initial landing page (progressive disclosure after first Search)
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 164 (search RESULTS page; label 'Consignee' -> input id=consignee verified). This control is absent from the DOM at action 161 (landing page has only 6 controls) — re-verified via control inventory at 161 vs 164.

fields.name: decision / decision
fields.label: Decision
options: Acceptable for release and free circulation
fields.conditionalOn: Results-page filter panel only — NOT present on the initial landing page

fields.name: riskCategory / riskCategory

fields.label: Start date

validationMessages: Start date must be a real date
Start date must be the same as or before End date
Enter start date and end date to search
Year must be later than {minYear-1} / Year must be before {maxYear+1}

LEGACY corroboration of legend + hint: ~/git/defra/ipaffs/ipaffs-frontend-decision/service/src/views/partials/common/arrivalDateTimeFilter.html:25-34 (heading 'Start date', formHint 'For example, 27 3 2022', elementName start-date -> Day/Month/Year via dynamic_fields/customSearchDate.html). Legacy Joi validation for this field — see validationMessages array (date_validation.js / date_validation_result.js).

validationMessages: End date must be a real date
Start date must be the same as or before End date
Enter start date and end date to search
Year must be later than {minYear-1} / Year must be before {maxYear+1}

LEGACY corroboration of legend + hint: ~/git/defra/ipaffs/ipaffs-frontend-decision/service/src/views/partials/common/arrivalDateTimeFilter.html:37-46 (heading 'End date', formHint 'For example, 27 3 2022', elementName end-date). Absent at action 161. Absent at action 161. LEGACY corroboration: ~/git/defra/ipaffs/ipaffs-frontend-decision/service/src/views/partials/common/arrivalDateTimeFilter.html:64-73 (heading 'End time (optional)', formHint 'For example, 14 50', elementName end-time). Time is optional; legacy Joi time validation — see validationMessages array.

fields.name: orderBy / orderBy
fields.label: Sort by:
fields.conditionalOn: Results-page filter panel only — NOT present on the initial landing page. The order param (orderBy=arrivalDateTimeDesc) is also applied automatically to the search URL after the first Search.
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 164 (search RESULTS page; 2 options verified verbatim). Absent at action 161. LEGACY value map: ~/git/defra/ipaffs/ipaffs-frontend-decision/service/src/utils/constants.js:569-571 orderBy { NEWEST: 'arrivalDateTimeDesc', OLDEST: 'arrivalDateTimeAsc' }; default sort is NEWEST (search_parameters.js:35).

fields.name: Status-Label
fields.label: CHED status tag (read-only output, verified after search)
fields.conditionalOn: Rendered on the CHED Overview page reached by opening a search result; verified via locator('#Status-Label').toContainText('Valid'). This is the -1 status-verification step, not a form input.
fields.evidence: trace b3742f19b6eea5d9285f5c8739571523a0a13ec1 action 171 (locator resolved to strong#Status-Label class='govuk-tag tag govuk-tag--green status-label' text='Valid', verified). Corroborated: the assertion target is the page object DecisionCHEDOverviewPage.locatorStatusLabel = page.locator('#Status-Label') at page-objects/decision/DecisionCHEDOverviewPage.ts:10-12; asserted for CHED-D at tests/notification/ched-d/ched-d-notification.spec.ts:34, ched-d-copy-as-new.spec.ts:43, ched-d-cuc-replacement-amendment.spec.ts:48. An alternative locator getChedStatus(text)=page.locator('#status-component div').filter({hasText: text}) (DecisionCHEDOverviewPage.ts:39-41) targets the same #status-component container the tag sits in.

fields.name: Status-Label (additional CHED-D lifecycle states)
fields.label: CHED status tag — further states asserted by CHED-D tests but not observed in our trace corpus
fields.conditionalOn: Same #Status-Label / #status-component tag as above, in later lifecycle stages (replacement, amendment, cancellation). Text asserted by tests; tag COLOUR for these states was not observed (gap).
fields.evidence: tests/notification/ched-d/ched-d-cuc-replacement-amendment.spec.ts:58 (locatorStatusLabel toContainText 'In progress' on a new replacement CHEDD), :67 ('Replaced' on the original after replacement); tests/notification/ched-d/ched-d-notification.spec.ts:75 (getChedStatus('Cancelled') visible after inspector cancels). 'Valid' is separately trace-confirmed in the field above. These enumerate the CHED-D status domain: Valid, In progress, Replaced, Cancelled — a subset of the 11 CHED-status filter labels; the remainder (Rejected, Partially Rejected, Split Consignment, Modify, To process, New) are asserted only for other CHED types and are a gap for CHED-D.

validationMessages.trigger: A partially-completed or non-parseable Start date in the 'Filter by arrival date and time' fieldset. {label} is the field heading ('Start date'); the same template produces "End date" invalid date for the End date field.
validationMessages.evidence: ~/git/defra/ipaffs/ipaffs-frontend-decision/service/src/validation/date_validation_result.js:21 (getMessage: message = `"${label}" invalid date`); template literal also in validation/validation_messages.js:4 DATE_VALIDATION_MESSAGE. This is the arrival-date filter on the Record decision search form (searchAndFilter.html -> common/arrivalDateTimeFilter.html).

validationMessages.message: Start date must be a real date
validationMessages.trigger: Day/month/year present but not a real calendar date (e.g. 31 2 2022). Message is `${capitaliseFirstLetter(label)} must be a real date`, so 'Start date must be a real date' / 'End date must be a real date'.
validationMessages.evidence: ~/git/defra/ipaffs/ipaffs-frontend-decision/service/src/validation/date_validation.js:206-209 (setIsRealDateValidation -> ANY_INVALID: `${capitaliseFirstLetter(label)} must be a real date`).

validationMessages.message: Start date must be the same as or before End date
validationMessages.trigger: Start date is later than End date in the arrival-date filter.
A partially-completed or non-parseable Start time / End time in the arrival-date-and-time filter. {label} is the field heading ('Start time (optional)' / 'End time (optional)').

validationMessages.message: Start time must be the same as or before End time
validationMessages.trigger: Start time is later than End time (same day) in the arrival-date-and-time filter.

validationMessages.message: Enter start date and end date to search
validationMessages.appliesTo: start-date-* / end-date-* (arrival date/time filter as a whole)
validationMessages.trigger: The arrival date/time filter is engaged (Filter clicked / a time entered) without both a start date and an end date. This is the only conditional-mandatory rule on this otherwise all-optional form: if you use the date filter, both dates are required.

validationMessages.message: Year must be later than {minYear-1}  /  Year must be before {maxYear+1}
validationMessages.trigger: Year outside the configured allowed range (default max year 2050). Messages are templated: `year must be later than ${minimumYear - 1}` and `year must be before ${maximumYear + 1}`, capitalised, optionally label-prefixed.

Shown when the date filter is used in the high-priority-tasks variant of the search (options.isHighPriorityRadioButton). Included for completeness — this variant is the searchAndFilterByDateAndTime.html form, adjacent to but not identical to the main bip-notifications landing/results form; may not fire on the record-decision-status path.

validationMessagesNote: LEGACY SOURCE for THIS page is the decision frontend (ipaffs-frontend-decision), NOT the notification microservice ValidationMessages.properties — this is the inspector-facing Record decision search dashboard, served by the decision service and validated client/server-side with Joi (src/validation/date_validation*.js). All validation here is confined to the arrival date/time filter; the text/select filter fields (keywords, commodity, certificateStatus, certificateType, countryOfOrigin, consignee, decision, riskOutcome, microchipNumber, riskCategory, orderBy) carry NO field-level validation in the legacy templates (partials/dashboard/*.html use plain govuk textInput/select with no required attribute or Joi rule), confirming the earlier inferred 'search form has no per-field validation'. The only mandatoriness anywhere on the page is the CONDITIONAL 'Enter start date and end date to search' cross-field rule when the arrival date filter is engaged.
openQuestions: PROGRESSIVE DISCLOSURE (verified 2026-07-18): the initial 'Import notifications' landing page (action 161) exposes only 6 filter controls — Select BCP, Keywords or CHED number, Commodity, CHED status, CHED type, Country of origin. The extended filter panel — Consignee, Decision, Risk outcome, Microchip number, Risk category, the arrival date/time fieldset and Sort by — only renders on the search RESULTS page (action 164) after a first Search. For the new CHED-D app this two-stage disclosure of the inspector filter set is a design decision, not necessarily a requirement; flag for human scoping.

The status tag colour mapping is only observed for 'Valid' -> govuk-tag--green. CHED-D tests now enumerate additional status TEXTs (In progress, Replaced, Cancelled — see the added inferred field) but assert text only, never the govuk-tag colour modifier. Colour-per-status for every state (New, In progress, Rejected, Cancelled, Replaced, Partially Rejected, Split Consignment, Modify, To process) is still a gap.

RESOLVED (legacy, 2026-07-18) — CHED status filter value/label mapping: the select's option VALUE is the enum key and the display text is its label. constants.js:408-419 statusDropDownValues maps SUBMITTED->'New', so DecisionDashboardPage.selectOption('SUBMITTED') selects the option rendered 'New'. Full map now recorded on the certificateStatus field (optionValueLabelMap). Same pattern for CHED type (CED->'CHED-D', constants.js:420-425), Decision, Risk category and Sort by. One subtlety for the new app: selecting 'To process' (TO_PROCESS) expands server-side to SUBMITTED,IN_PROGRESS,MODIFY (constants.js:61-65 getStatus).

PARTIALLY RESOLVED (legacy, 2026-07-18) — validation/error copy: the text/select filter fields genuinely have NO field-level validation in the legacy templates (partials/dashboard/*.html are plain govuk textInput/select, no required attr / Joi rule), confirming the earlier inferred-likely. BUT the arrival date/time filter DOES validate: 8 Joi messages now recorded in validationMessages (invalid date/time, must be a real date, start<=end for date and time, year range, and the conditional 'Enter start date and end date to search'). Source is the DECISION frontend (ipaffs-frontend-decision/src/validation/date_validation*.js), not the notification microservice ValidationMessages.properties. The DecisionDashboardPage banner helpers (DecisionDashboardPage.ts:200-235) target page-level alert banners, a separate concern.

The CHED Overview page (where #Status-Label lives) exposes several inspector controls the page object drives but that are out of the record-decision-status verify scope: #notification-reference-number (DecisionCHEDOverviewPage.ts:26-28), Copy as replacement #replace-certificate (:18-20), Request amendment link (:22-24), Raise border notification #raise-border-notification (:68-74), plus 'BCP or Port of entry' and 'Permanent addresses' sections and a Checks tab. For the new CHED-D app the only load-bearing requirement here is: a submitted CHED-D is findable by its CHED number and exposes a machine-checkable status tag. Flag whether any of these overview affordances belong in the notifier-facing rebuild — human scoping.

Both top-level evidence pointers (trace eddc6f6… action 161 and trace b3742f19… action 166) land on the 'fill keywords' action on the Record decision search landing page ('Import notifications' / 'Assess consignments'); the actual #Status-Label verification is action 171 in trace b3742f19…, on the CHED Overview page (H1 'CHEDD.GB.2026.1525931 - V1', caption 'CHED overview', page title 'CHED Overview CHEDD.GB.2026.1525931 - Import and export applications - GOV.UK'). This page spec therefore documents the composite re-search-then-verify flow: the search form + the status tag.

The 'record-decision-status' flow is a post-submission inspector verification, not a CHED-D data-entry page. For the new CHED-D pre-notification app the load-bearing requirement is: a submitted CHED-D must be findable by its CHED number and expose a machine-checkable status. The full Record-decision search form (BCP filter, decision/risk-outcome/risk-category, arrival date/time filters, sort, results list, pagination) is operational-inspector tooling that may be out of scope for the notifier-facing rebuild — flag for human scoping.

Microchip number (CHED-A only) and Risk category (CHED-P only) render unconditionally on the shared cross-CHED results-page search panel despite their labels; whether they are hidden/disabled when CHED type = CHED-D was not observed — gap.

The BCP list (~200 options) and Country of origin list (~250 options) are reference data; the new app should source these from a reference-data service rather than hardcode them. Counts are approximate (lists truncated in capture).
